item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 7min Pretty strong case given that LIV pretty much cut/pasted all of the PGL’s ideas. Cita
item.description:
Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 7min Pretty strong case given that LIV pretty much cut/pasted all of the PGL’s ideas. Cita Sky Sports Golf @SkySportsGolf · 1h LIV Golf and the Public Investment Fund of Saudi Arabia have been sued by its predecessor Premier Golf League.
In a court filing from April 16, Premier Golf and its parent company World Golf Group Limited, have filed a lawsuit against the Public Investment Fund, Golf Saudi, 4 2 10 3 mil

item.title: acaseofthegolf1: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 11min You really should go to LIV YouTube chat. There is no golf but the chat is amazin
item.description: Monday Q Info @acaseofthegolf1 · 11min You really should go to LIV YouTube chat. There is no golf but the chat is amazing Cita Eric @ertiru05 · 13min En respuesta a @acaseofthegolf1 The liv channel YouTube chat is on fire right now 7 16 4 mil

item.title: NUCLRGOLF: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 14min #UPDATE — LIV Golf’s broadcast in Mexico City has now been facing technical difficulties
item.description: NUCLR GOLF @NUCLRGOLF · 14min #UPDATE — LIV Golf’s broadcast in Mexico City has now been facing technical difficulties for over an hour as a power issue has reportedly caused a production shutdown. Viewers trying to watch are currently seeing this message across their screens. De David Rumsey 12 7 37 5 mil
